role: Israel Desk Officer, Quds Force 'Zionist File' (d. 2026)
bio: Hossein Ahmadlou served as the Israel Desk Officer within the [IRGC Quds Force](/orgs/irgc-quds-force), running what was internally called the 'Zionist File' — the directorate responsible for intelligence and operations targeting Israel. He was killed during the 2026 war as part of the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave) and associated Israeli operations.

sources.title: Quds Force Israel Desk Officer Killed

editorial_notes: Killed in 2026 war, specific date not confirmed. Quds Force 'Zionist File' desk officer.
